scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BE,FE" -c "cyan,magenta" --kill-others "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend run db:generate && npm --prefix backend run db:push
